requirement_topic.en: Lithium Cell & Battery Pack Safety — BS EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯及电池组安全——BS EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯及電池組安全——BS EN IEC 62133-2

summary.en: Portable rechargeable lithium-ion and lithium-polymer cells and battery packs placed on the UK (Great Britain) market must meet BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 (Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed lithium secondary cells, and for batteries made from them, for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems). This is the UK Approved Standard for portable lithium battery safety. The standard covers electrical, mechanical, and environmental abuse tests including overcharge, forced discharge, short circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and vibration. Manufacturers must hold a valid test report from a UKAS-accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory demonstrating conformity before placing goods on the GB market.
summary.zh: 在英国（大不列颠）市场销售的便携式可充电锂离子及锂聚合物电芯和电池组，须符合BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质的蓄电池——用于便携式应用的便携式密封锂二次电芯及电池组安全要求——第2部分：锂系统）。这是英国关于便携式锂电池安全的认可标准。该标准涵盖电气、机械及环境滥用测试，包括过充、强制放电、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及振动测试。制造商须持有由UKAS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室出具的合格测试报告，方可在英国大不列颠市场销售。
summary.zht: 在英國（大不列顛）市場銷售的便攜式可充電鋰離子及鋰聚合物電芯和電池組，須符合BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質的蓄電池——用於便攜式應用的便攜式密封鋰二次電芯及電池組安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統）。這是英國關於便攜式鋰電池安全的認可標準。該標準涵蓋電氣、機械及環境濫用測試，包括過充、強制放電、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及振動測試。製造商須持有由UKAS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室出具的合格測試報告，方可在英國大不列顛市場銷售。

standards_or_laws: BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Secondary cells and batteries — Safety requirements for portable sealed lithium secondary cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (UK Approved Standard)
General Product Safety Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/1803) — general safety duty
Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101) — where product is in scope as electrical equipment

summary.en: China's domestic mandatory standard for portable lithium battery safety is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment), enforced by SAMR under the compulsory certification (CCC) framework for applicable product categories. For mobile phone batteries specifically, GB 18287-2013 applies. Both standards are technically derived from IEC 62133 but incorporate national deviations, and Chinese CNAS-accredited lab reports to GB 31241 or GB 18287 are not accepted as substitutes for BS EN IEC 62133-2 testing under the UK conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国关于便携式锂电池安全的强制性国内标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子产品用锂离子电池和电池组安全要求），由市场监管总局依据强制性认证（CCC）框架对适用产品类别实施管理。针对手机电池，GB 18287-2013适用。两项标准均源自IEC 62133，但含有国家偏差，国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241或GB 18287出具的检测报告，不被英国合格评定路径接受作为BS EN IEC 62133-2检测的替代。
summary.zht: 中國關於便攜式鋰電池安全的強制性國內標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子產品用鋰離子電池和電池組安全要求），由市場監管總局依據強制性認證（CCC）框架對適用產品類別實施管理。針對手機電池，GB 18287-2013適用。兩項標準均源自IEC 62133，但含有國家偏差，國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241或GB 18287出具的檢測報告，不被英國合格評定路徑接受作為BS EN IEC 62133-2檢測的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment (SAMR, mandatory)
GB 18287-2013 — Secondary lithium batteries for mobile phones (SAC, mandatory for mobile phone batteries)

gap.en: Exporters holding only GB 31241 or GB 18287 test reports must commission fresh BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 testing from a UKAS-accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory. While GB 31241 shares a common IEC 62133 lineage, national deviations mean the test scope, pass/fail criteria, and documentation format differ. Particular gaps include: (1) specific test sequences and acceptance limits under AMD1:2021 not present in the GB edition; (2) UK Declaration of Conformity (UKDoC) referencing the UK Approved Standard; (3) UKCA marking on product and packaging (for in-scope products); (4) English-language safety instructions and labelling. Battery-only products (cells and packs not embedded in finished goods) require the same testing; power banks additionally fall under electrical equipment safety rules.
gap.zh: 仅持有GB 31241或GB 18287测试报告的出口商，须重新委托UKAS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室完成BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021测试。尽管GB 31241与IEC 62133具有共同渊源，但国家偏差导致测试范围、合格/不合格判定标准及文件格式存在差异。主要差距包括：（1）AMD1:2021规定的特定测试序列及合格判定限值，GB版本中未涵盖；（2）引用英国认可标准的英国合规声明（UKDoC）；（3）产品及包装上的UKCA标志（适用产品）；（4）英文安全说明及标签。仅电池产品（非嵌入成品的电芯和电池组）须进行同等测试；移动电源还须额外符合电气设备安全规则。
gap.zht: 僅持有GB 31241或GB 18287測試報告的出口商，須重新委託UKAS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室完成BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021測試。儘管GB 31241與IEC 62133具有共同淵源，但國家偏差導致測試範圍、合格/不合格判定標準及文件格式存在差異。主要差距包括：（1）AMD1:2021規定的特定測試序列及合格判定限值，GB版本中未涵蓋；（2）引用英國認可標準的英國合規聲明（UKDoC）；（3）產品及包裝上的UKCA標誌（適用產品）；（4）英文安全說明及標籤。僅電池產品（非嵌入成品的電芯和電池組）須進行同等測試；行動電源還須額外符合電氣設備安全規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BS EN IEC 62133-2 is the UK Approved Standard for portable lithium secondary cell/pack safety; conformity is required before GB market placement under General Product Safety Regulations 2005
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 required under SAMR/CCC framework for applicable portable electronic product categories; GB 18287-2013 for mobile phone batteries

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 is the mandatory UK Approved Standard for portable lithium secondary cell and battery pack safety. Chinese GB 31241 or GB 18287 test reports alone do not satisfy the UK conformity assessment pathway. Independent re-testing to BS EN IEC 62133-2 by a UKAS or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory, a UK Declaration of Conformity, and UKCA marking (where in scope) are all required before lawful placement on the Great Britain market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021是英国关于便携式锂二次电芯及电池组安全的强制性认可标准。仅凭中国GB 31241或GB 18287测试报告，不满足英国合格评定路径要求。在英国大不列颠市场合法销售前，须由UKAS或ILAC MRA认可实验室独立重新完成BS EN IEC 62133-2测试，并出具英国合规声明（UKDoC）及加贴UKCA标志（适用范围内的产品）。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021是英國關於便攜式鋰二次電芯及電池組安全的強制性認可標準。僅憑中國GB 31241或GB 18287測試報告，不滿足英國合格評定路徑要求。在英國大不列顛市場合法銷售前，須由UKAS或ILAC MRA認可實驗室獨立重新完成BS EN IEC 62133-2測試，並出具英國合規聲明（UKDoC）及加貼UKCA標誌（適用範圍內的產品）。
